filter.booleanFilter: ((1 AND 2 AND 3 AND (4 OR 5 OR 6) AND (7 OR 8) AND 9))

criteriaItems.value: 6. COO / Executive Director / EVP,7. CFO / Finance Director / SVP,9. CIO / CTO / IT Director,11. Pricing Leader
